programs.title: To Catch a Smuggler: South Pacific
programs.desc: Witchcraft; suspicious lampshades; a man who may be a sex worker.

programs.title: To Catch a Smuggler: South Pacific
programs.desc: A hidden haul; a student's mistake; a picture worth a thousand words.

programs.title: To Catch a Smuggler: Peru
programs.desc: The agents identify two suspicious travelers going to Mexico; the body scan shows they are carrying capsules inside their bodies; in the hospital, one of them reveals that they are pregnant.

programs.title: To Catch a Smuggler: Peru
programs.desc: A 19-year-old's bag is filled with damp clothes that turn out to be soaked in liquid cocaine; police find 16kg worth of drugs in a suitcase; officers detain a pair of Colombians headed to Mexico.

programs.title: To Catch a Smuggler: Peru
programs.desc: At Jorge Chávez Airport in Lima, Peru, agents hold a Spanish passenger when they discover that their suitcases conceal almost 10 kilos of cocaine.

programs.title: To Catch a Smuggler: Peru
programs.desc: A young man seems unaware he's committed a crime, despite being caught carrying 30 times the legal amount of marijuana. At the docks, a shipment of hats raises suspicions.
